title: T.O Magic Reimagined
description: Transforms the bulky 3D icons from T.O Magic ’n Extras into clean, stylish 2D visuals inspired by classic Minecraft
body:
![av](https://i.imgur.com/HZphQv4.png)

## About

T.O Magic Reimagined converts the bulky 3D GUI and item icons from T.O Magic ’n Extras into a clean, vanilla-style 2D interface, making menus easier to read, visuals lighter, and the overall experience more immersive.

ℹ️ **Important:** This pack only affects the **GUI, HUD, and item icons**.  
It does not change world models, blocks, or gameplay mechanics.

**P.S.** You are welcome to use this resource pack in your modpacks

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/01QgFlQ.png)

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/kGXCe4C.png)  
  

When playing with **T.O Magic ’n Extras**, the bulky 3D-style GUI and item icons often feel disconnected from Minecraft’s classic visual language.  
This resource pack reimagines them with a clean **2D design**, bringing the interface back in line with the familiar Minecraft UI style.  
  

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/fH7nEDW.png)  
  

### What this resource pack changes:

*   Over 20 T.O Magic items redesigned with clean **2D icons**
*   Bulky 3D GUI elements replaced with flat, readable visuals
*   Simplified **3D models** in vanilla Minecraft style
*   Improved readability during combat and inventory management  
      
    

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/4fKnAUn.png)  
  

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/mT87RX1.png) ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/4vIqCKF.gif)

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/2bqZm2i.png)

❔ **Will this pack break my game or the mod?**  
✅ No. This is a standard resource pack that only modifies visual elements and is completely safe to use.

❔ **Do I need OptiFine?**  
✅ No. The pack works perfectly without OptiFine.

❔ **Will new items be supported in future updates?**  
✅ Yes! New 2D icons and simplified 3D models will be added as T.O Magic receives updates.  
  

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/kbEwbDk.png)

*   **Original Mod Author:** [GameTechBC](https://www.curseforge.com/members/gametechbc/projects) — thanks for the amazing mod!
*   **Сoncept -  T.O Magic 'n Extras 3D to 2D Weapons Retexture**

> **⚖️ Rights:** This project is a fan-made resource pack. All rights for the original mod belong to its creator, GameTechBC. We are simply enhancing its visual presentation.
